mission.title: kubernetes: Support mixed protocol LBs
mission.description:
**What type of PR is this?**

**What this PR does / why we need it**:

This PR adds support for configuring a service of type LoadBalancer with more than 1 protocol. For example, this allows configuring a LoadBalancer with both TCP and UDP port 53 (for a DNS server), or TCP and UDP 443 for HTTPS + QUIC (HTTP 3.0).

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

Mixed protocol LBs are supported by Azure and MetalLB. Other providers MAY support this, however, I'm unable t

resolution.summary:
**What type of PR is this?**

**What this PR does / why we need it**:
fix mixed protocol issue for azure load balancer, with below config (`service.beta.kubernetes.io/azure-load-balancer-mixed-protocols: "true"`), azure provider will create both TCP and UDP rules for the service.
```
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/azure-load-balancer-mixed-protocols: "true"
  name: web
  namespace: default
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 80
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: web
  sessionAffinity: None
  type: LoadBalancer
```

With this PR, you could see below both TCP and UDP rules are created for the service:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4178417/52937705-da2eef80-339a-11e9-8d4f-9578c8cb1d0f.png)

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:

**Special notes for your reviewer**:
Original PR(https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/pull/67986) is not completed, I have no idea why I submitted a non-completed PR at that time...

**Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?**:

**What type of PR is this?**
/kind bug

**What this PR does / why we need it**:
fix mixed protocol issue for azure load balancer, with below config (`service.beta.kubernetes.io/azure-load-balancer-mixed-protocols: "true"`), azure provider will create both TCP and UDP rules for the service.

With this PR, you could see below both TCP and UDP rules are created for the service:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4178417/52937705-da2eef80-339a-11e9-8d4f-9578c8cb1d0f.png)

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
